article_title: SOLID 原则在 C# 和 .NET 10 里的落地方式
core_theme: 用五个 SOLID 原则把 C# 代码从难改、难测、易连锁出错，整理成职责清晰、可扩展、可替换的结构。
reader_takeaway: 读者能理解 SRP、OCP、LSP、ISP、DIP 各自解决什么失败模式，以及现代 .NET 10 如何让这些原则更自然地落地。
summary_angle: SOLID 不是背概念，而是把混在一起的职责、分支、继承和依赖拆成更稳定的模块边界。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头提到一个类做六件事、测试难写、修一个 bug 引出两个新 bug。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧一团纠缠的代码模块和断裂测试线。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文用 SRP、OCP、LSP、ISP、DIP 五个原则拆解不同失败模式。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间五块小型原则板围绕一个 C# 模块进行校准。

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 .NET 10 部分提到 records、内置 DI、ILogger<T>、IMiddleware、IActionFilter、IHostedService。
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧形成清晰模块、接口插槽和可替换依赖。

main_metaphor: 把纠缠代码重新分拣为可替换的模块化工坊。
primary_subject: 一个抽象的 C# 模块工坊核心
subject_action: 正在把混乱依赖线拆分并接入清晰接口插槽
composition: 等距空间，左侧混乱输入，中间原则校准，右侧稳定输出，单个 C# 模块工坊作为主焦点
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: European clear-line comic style, precise outlines, flat readable colors, tidy environments, restrained humor and detail
selected_style_reason: 随机选中；清线风适合把 SOLID 的模块边界和依赖关系画清楚，避免变成抽象科技氛围图。
style_safety_note: 该风格是通用漫画视觉语言描述，不指向特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家。
draft_goal: 第一轮验证 2.35:1 宽封面中是否能看出混乱代码经过五原则整理成 .NET 10 模块结构。
revision_targets: 减少文字，只保留 1-3 个短标签
避免真实 UI、dashboard 或代码截图
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: SOLID principles in C# and .NET 10 turn tangled, hard-to-test code into modular, extensible, substitutable design. The reader should quickly feel that SOLID is a practical structure tool, not memorized terminology.

Summary angle: SOLID is not just five definitions; it separates mixed responsibilities, brittle branches, unsafe inheritance, bloated interfaces, and concrete dependencies into stable module boundaries.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 3 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- problem: tangled class responsibilities, fragile tests, bug-fix ripple effects; visible label: 耦合
- mechanism: five principles SRP, OCP, LSP, ISP, DIP as compact calibration plates around the main module; visible label: 五原则, numeric chip: 5
- takeaway: .NET 10 support through records, built-in dependency injection, ILogger<T>, middleware and hosted-service abstractions; visible label: .NET 10, numeric chip: 10

Main metaphor: a modular C# workshop that sorts tangled code into clean replaceable parts.
Subject: an abstract C# module workshop core, splitting dependency wires and plugging them into clean interface sockets.
Composition/framing: isometric conceptual systems scene, left side tangled input, center principle calibration, right side stable modular output, one C# module workshop as the dominant focal subject. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine isometric conceptual systems scene with the selected visual style descriptor: European clear-line comic style, precise outlines, flat readable colors, tidy environments, restrained humor and detail. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: ink blue, warm white, muted green, amber accent.
Visible text policy: allow only these short labels if needed: 耦合, 五原则, .NET 10. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans beyond .NET 10, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: realistic IDE screenshot, terminal window, dashboard panels, meaningless code rain, generic robot, neon city background, dense tiny text.
